name: handle-review
description: Use when responding to code review or other critical feedback (PR comments, design review, written critique). Enforces verify-before-implement, reasoned push-back, one-item-at-a-time execution, and no performative agreement. Includes read-only gh helpers for PR context.

interface.longDescription: Use when responding to code review or other critical feedback (PR comments, design review, written critique). Enforces verify-before-implement, reasoned push-back, one-item-at-a-time execution, and no performative agreement. Includes read-only gh helpers for PR context.
